title: Mental Health Evaluation * Immigration Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Mental Health Evaluation * Immigration Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Older Adults Immigration Issues LGBTQ2+ Issues Native American Community AIDS/HIV Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF LIFE COUNSELING COUNSELING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health services including individual counseling, couples counseling, adolescent therapy, family therapy, play therapy, group therapy, and immigration assessments. 851 NE Baker Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5:30pm, Friday 8:30am-12:30pm Email (503) 435-4840 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIFE COUNSELING COUNSELING SERVICES
